name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: Standard terms for a mutual NDA allowing both parties to share confidential information for a defined purpose, with protections for both the disclosing and receiving party.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page template to be completed by the parties when executing the Common Paper Mutual NDA, capturing purpose, effective date, term, governing law, and signatures.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: Comprehensive standard terms for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering access, restrictions, privacy, payment, liability, and indemnification.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: Agreement for early product access in exchange for structured feedback and participation in a design partner program, with IP assignment of feedback to the provider.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: Defines uptime targets, response time commitments, and service credit remedies for cloud services, designed to be used alongside the Common Paper CSA.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: Governs the provision of professional services and delivery of work products via SOWs, covering IP ownership, payment, indemnification, and confidentiality.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: GDPR-compliant agreement for the processing of personal data by a provider on behalf of a customer, including EEA/UK standard contractual clauses and subprocessor rules.

name: Software License Agreement
description: Standard terms for licensing on-premise or installable software to customers, covering installation rights, restrictions, warranties, and support obligations.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: Governs cooperation, trademark licensing, payment, and mutual obligations between business partners, including confidentiality and indemnification provisions.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: Short-term agreement for trials or evaluations of a product before a full commercial commitment, with limited warranties and easy termination rights.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: HIPAA-compliant agreement governing the handling of protected health information (PHI) by a business associate on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: Addendum to a cloud service or software agreement governing the use of AI/ML services, including input/output ownership, model training restrictions, and AI-specific disclaimers.
